use_cases: Hero section headlines that need visual impact and draw attention
Feature or section titles with an elegant shimmer animation
Accent text elements for landing pages and marketing sites
Loading states or empty state messaging with animated emphasis
Brand typography elements requiring a premium, polished appearance
ai_summary: A lightweight text component that applies a continuous left-to-right shining/reflective animation using CSS gradients and Framer Motion. The effect creates a metallic shimmer across any text string, making it ideal for hero headlines, section titles, or decorative typography in landing pages and marketing sites. The animation loops infinitely with smooth linear easing.
